# DKG wire-protocol contract (normalized)

# type vocabulary
C>announce_session
C>register
C>relay
C>session_status_update
S>devices
S>relay
S>session_available

# announce_session (client→server)
{"session_info":{"coordination_type":"Network","curve_type":"secp256k1","participants":["<device>"],"proposer_id":"<proposer_id>","session_id":"<session_id>","session_type":"dkg","threshold":2,"total":2},"type":"announce_session"}

# session_available (server→client)
{"session_info":{"coordination_type":"Network","curve_type":"secp256k1","participants":["<device>"],"proposer_id":"<proposer_id>","session_id":"<session_id>","session_type":"dkg","threshold":2,"total":2},"type":"session_available"}
